name_en: Goyard 2025 Limited Edition Goyard takes us on a stroll through a ever-changing, blooming garden, enjoying a double sensory and emotional experience. The SAINT LOUIS Mini Bag features two unique GOYARDINE canvas colors inspired by the bright tones of linen flowers, better highlighting the dual-use inspiration in the original SAINT LOUIS design.
name_cn:
Goyard 2025 Limited Edition Goyard takes us on a stroll through a ever-changing, blooming garden, enjoying a double sensory and emotional experience. The SAINT LOUIS Mini Bag features two unique GOYARDINE canvas colors inspired by the bright tones of linen flowers, better highlighting the dual-use inspiration in the original SAINT LOUIS design.
PM Size: 19.5×9×19.5cm, opening 28cm
Color: Rose Red
🔍020660-1
